name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual payroll tax filing causes late submissions, leading to penalties. We automate payroll tax filings instead of manual filing and tracking.
problem_solved: manual payroll tax filing processes lead to errors and delays

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual payroll tax filing processes lead to errors and delays
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual payroll tax filing causes late submissions, leading to penalties. We automate payroll tax filings instead of manual filing and tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual filing and tracking of payroll taxes

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual payroll tax filing causes late submissions, leading to penalties. We automate payroll tax filings instead of manual filing and tracking.
